resources.name: [format('{0}/{1}', format('{0}-{1}', parameters('vmNamePrefix'), range(0, parameters('sessionHostCount'))[range(0, parameters('sessionHostCount'))[copyIndex()]]), 'InstallAVDAgentEntra')]
dependsOn: [extensionResourceId(resourceId('Microsoft.DesktopVirtualization/hostPools', parameters('hostPoolName')), 'Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments', guid(resourceId('Microsoft.DesktopVirtualization/hostPools', parameters('hostPoolName')), resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines', format('{0}-{1}', parameters('vmNamePrefix'), range(0, parameters('sessionHostCount'))[range(0, parameters('sessionHostCount'))[range(0, parameters('sessionHostCount'))[copyIndex()]]])), 'avd-contributor'))]
